name: Chatwork
description: Tokyo-listed business chat for Japanese SMBs — messaging, tasks, video with Webhook & REST API for bots.

seo.title: Chatwork — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: Chatwork: Tokyo-listed business chat for Japanese SMBs — messaging, tasks, video with Webhook & REST API for bots.

when_to_use: Bot integration for CI/CD notifications in Japanese teams
REST API for task assignment automation
Team messaging with video for Japanese SMB workflow
API for helpdesk ticket-to-chat escalation flows

pros: Dominant in Japanese SMBs with local-language support
Built-in tasks and video call reduce tool sprawl
Webhook + REST API for bots and notifications
Tokyo-listed, stable vendor for enterprise procurement
cons: UI and UX trail Slack and Teams noticeably
Developer ecosystem and integrations are thin
Search and message history feel limited
Mostly useful inside Japan — little global pull
review.verdict: The de facto business chat for Japanese SMBs; decent API, but outside Japan Slack or Teams usually win.
review.best_for: Japanese SMBs wanting local-language chat with light bot automation
review.not_for: Global teams needing deep integrations or modern collaboration UX
